In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], during the offensive that preceded [[Operation Shadow Hand]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] '''conquered''' the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Metellos/Legends|Metellos]] before moving on to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==The battle==
As part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] renewed [[Pre–Shadow Hand campaign|offensive]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]] leading up to [[Operation Shadow Hand]],<ref name="Atlas" /> [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Sander Delvardus]] led<ref name="Core" /> one of three massive Imperial fleets out of the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]].<ref name="Warfare">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> While the other two fleets attacked [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and [[Giju/Legends|Giju]],<ref name="Atlas" /> the Imperial Deep Core forces conquered [[Kaikielius/Legends|Kaikielius]] and [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]] in quick succession, and moved<ref name="Atlas" /> to the energy-producing world of [[Metellos/Legends|Metellos]]. Annihilating the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] fleet launched to stop him,<ref name="Warfare" /> Delvardus initiated an intense [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]], resulting in over five billion civilian casualties.<ref name="Core" />

But as the New Republic gathered forces to stop the Empire at Metellos, they were caught by surprise when an additional fleet sent by the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]] arrived at [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], while a third launched [[Attack on the Borderland Regions|attacks]] in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Borderland Regions]]. The New Republic was forced to retreat along the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]], leaving Coruscant to the Empire.<ref name="Warfare" />
